name: Ubiquiti Network Video Recorder Instant
title: Ubiquiti Network Video Recorder Instant
short_description: Network Video Recorder with 6-port PoE switch, HDMI ViewPort, 3.5" HDD bay, quad-core ARM Cortex-A55 processor, and UniFi Protect integration.
description: Network Video Recorder with 6-port PoE switch, HDMI ViewPort, 3.5" HDD bay, quad-core ARM Cortex-A55 processor, and UniFi Protect integration.

detailed_description.heading: Video Management
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UNVR-Instant is a compact and reliable network video recorder designed to make security systems easier to deploy and manage. It includes a 3.5" HDD bay, giving you the flexibility to add local storage for recordings. Equipped with a 6‑port PoE switch, the unit allows direct camera connection and power delivery, simplifying installation. For simple on-site monitoring, the device features an HDMI ViewPort that lets you view live feeds or recordings on a screen without a separate computer. The UNVR-Instant can support up to 6 cameras in 4K resolution, 8 cameras in 2K, or 15 cameras in HD, making it adaptable for different system sizes. With its sleek and compact design, it fits neatly into small spaces and is easy to mount, while still delivering enterprise-level video management through the UniFi Protect platform.

detailed_description.heading: Connectivity Features
detailed_description.text: The UNVR-Instant combines smart power distribution with flexible connectivity options. It includes one Gigabit uplink port for connecting to your main network and six Gigabit PoE ports for powering cameras or other devices. The PoE budget of 40 W ensures reliable power delivery, with each port supporting up to 15.4 W. The system runs on an integrated power supply (100–240 VAC), so there's no need for external adapters, and idle power usage is only about 9 W, keeping operating costs low. The UNVR-Instant uses a quad-core ARM Cortex-A55 processor at 1.7 GHz with 4 GB of RAM, providing smooth handling of video recording, streaming, and management. The device is light but durable, with a tough polycarbonate enclosure. This makes it practical for many types of installations, from office spaces to edge deployments, while still offering the performance needed to run multiple cameras efficiently.

detailed_description.heading: Deployment Efficiency
detailed_description.text: The UNVR-Instant is designed to reduce complexity and improve efficiency in surveillance projects. With its built-in PoE switch, there's no need for extra switches or power injectors, as the cameras connect directly to the recorder. The HDMI output provides an easy way to display live or recorded video on a connected monitor, making local monitoring straightforward. Thanks to full integration with the UniFi Protect platform, you can manage everything through a simple, license-free interface, both locally and remotely. The device's small form factor and multiple mounting options (desktop, wall, or DIN-rail) make it versatile for different environments, whether in small businesses, branch offices, or edge sites. Its ability to support various camera resolutions allows it to scale with your needs. Altogether, the UNVR-Instant offers a balanced mix of convenience, reliability, and scalability in a single compact unit.
